title: Préstame tu cuerpo
actors: Silvia Pinal, Manolo Fábregas, Prudencia Grifell
plot: This is a very light, like comedy Heaven can wait, where the character of Mrs. Pinal, Eleanor, is star, and perishes in an accident at sea on his way back to Mexico for error Simplicia, his angel guard (Prudencia Grifell)
